ownerPrompt.title: Who Are You?
ownerPrompt.subtitle: Select your identity in this chat
ownerPrompt.description: Your messages will appear on the right side of the chat viewer, and AI conversations can identify you for more accurate analysis. Other chats from the same platform will be filled in automatically.
ownerPrompt.dontRemind: Don't remind me for this chat
ownerPrompt.appliedToOthers: Automatically applied to {count} chats from the same platform
ownerPrompt.helper: Helps AI identify you in conversations for more accurate analysis

list.title: Group Member Management
list.description: {count} members. Add aliases or remove members
list.searchPlaceholder: Search nickname, account name, ID or alias
list.tip: Tip: Adding aliases helps identify chat participants and improves search and AI analysis accuracy.

mergeModal.title: Merge Members?
mergeModal.content: Merge {source} ({sourceCount} messages) into {target} ({targetCount} messages). By default, the merged name keeps the member with more messages.
mergeModal.hint: This action cannot be undone. All messages from the merged member will be reassigned to the kept member.

modal.title: Delete Member?
modal.content: This will delete member {name} and their {count} messages. This action cannot be undone.

nicknameHistory.note: Note: QQ's legacy client can export chat history as txt format, which provides the most accurate nickname history
nicknameHistory.title: Nickname History
nicknameHistory.empty: No members have changed their nicknames

twoWay.title: 💕 Mutual Detection
twoWay.description: Found {count} frequent CP pairs (mutual {'@'} with ≥30% balance)

private.title: Chat Members
private.description: {count} members. Add aliases for search and AI analysis
private.tipContent: Adding aliases helps identify chat participants and improves search and AI analysis accuracy.
